settings.title: What is it?
settings.content: Laushe's Organic Weight Gainer is a 100% natural, Sunnah-blessed formula designed to help you build healthy mass, strengthen muscles, and support your body's energy needs — without artificial fillers or harmful additives.

settings.title: Who's it for
settings.content: Ideal for those who struggle to gain weight naturally, gym-goers looking to build lean muscle, or anyone who wants a clean, organic way to support healthy body mass and sustained energy levels.

settings.title: Benefits
settings.content:
Made from wholesome, 100% organic ingredients
Supports gradual, healthy weight gain without unhealthy fats
Packed with natural proteins to fuel muscle growth
Complex carbs provide long-lasting energy throughout the day
Free from artificial additives, fillers, and processed sugars
Gentle on the stomach and easy to incorporate into meals

settings.title: How to use
settings.content:
Combine 2 scoops with 300ml of milk or water and stir well
Consume two times a day — once in the morning and once after exercise
Add to smoothies or shakes for extra calories and protein
Use regularly alongside a balanced diet for optimal results

settings.heading: A natural, nutrient-packed formula with proteins, good fats, and complex carbs to help you build healthy muscle and gain strength.
settings.subheading: Supported by nature, backed by tradition.

settings.title: Almond & Cashew Powder
settings.desc: Nutrient-rich fats and protein for lean mass

settings.title: Whey Protein (Natural)
settings.desc: Pure protein to build and repair muscles

settings.title: Banana Powder
settings.desc: Natural sweetness with potassium for performance

settings.title: Flaxseed Meal
settings.desc: Plant-based omega-3s and fiber for digestion

settings.heading: Your Daily Mass-Building Ritual
settings.step1_text: Combine 2 scoops with 300ml of milk or water and stir well
settings.step2_text: Consume two times a day — once in the morning and once after exercise
settings.step3_text: Add to smoothies or shakes for extra calories and protein
settings.step4_text: Use regularly alongside a balanced diet for optimal results

settings.question: Who can use Weight Gainer 100% Organic?
settings.answer: This formula is ideal for anyone looking to increase healthy body mass, including active adults, athletes, or those struggling to gain weight naturally. It's suitable for most adults when combined with a balanced diet.

settings.question: How quickly will I see results?
settings.answer: Results vary depending on diet and exercise routine. With consistent use and proper nutrition, most users notice gradual, healthy weight gain within 4–6 weeks.

settings.question: Can it replace meals?
settings.answer: Weight Gainer is meant to complement your diet, not replace meals. It works best when taken alongside regular meals to provide additional nutrients, protein, and calories for muscle growth.

settings.question: Is it safe for sensitive stomachs?
settings.answer: Yes, this formula is made from gentle, organic ingredients and is easy to digest. If you have specific dietary concerns or allergies, consult a healthcare professional before use.

settings.question: Can it be mixed with other drinks or foods?
settings.answer: Absolutely! You can blend it with milk, water, smoothies, or even add it to oatmeal or shakes to boost calories and protein intake without affecting taste.

settings.headline: Build a Healthier, Stronger You Naturally
settings.subtext: Gain healthy weight and build real strength with Laushe's 100% organic, Sunnah-blessed Weight Gainer — no shortcuts, no chemicals.
